summary: Completed testing of new Beauty Parlour features: WhatsApp button with text, Contact page simplification, Weekly Working Hours in admin settings, dynamic Open/Closed status, past slot filtering for today's bookings, and multiple bookings per slot. All features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: React hydration warning - span inside option element
integration_issues.note: Does not affect functionality but shows console warning

seed_data_creation: Created test users for booking tests via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: WhatsApp button shows 'Book Now on WhatsApp', Contact page has 4 sections with icons and Get Directions button (no map), Admin Settings has Weekly Working Hours with toggle per day, Homepage shows dynamic Open/Closed status, Booking filters past slots for today, Multiple bookings per slot allowed, Holidays tab removed from admin sidebar.

backend_tests: Settings API returns weekly_hours with 7 days
Available slots for today filter out past times
Future date slots return all times
Closed day returns no slots with appropriate message
Multiple customers can book same time slot
Proper 'booking closed' message when past closing time
frontend_tests: WhatsApp float button visible with 'Book Now on WhatsApp' text
Homepage shows dynamic Open/Closed status (e.g., 'Open Now – Closes at 10:00 PM')
Contact page has 4 info sections (Address, Phone, Email, Hours) with icons
Contact page has Get Directions button (opens Google Maps)
Contact page has NO Google Map iframe
Admin sidebar has 13 items (Holidays NOT present)
Admin Settings shows Weekly Working Hours section with all 7 days
Admin can toggle days Open/Closed and save settings
Time inputs disabled when day is marked as closed
Booking page filters past slots for today

features_verified.whatsapp_button: PASS - Shows 'Book Now on WhatsApp' text label
features_verified.contact_page_no_map: PASS - No Google Map iframe present
features_verified.get_directions_button: PASS - Present and opens Google Maps directions
features_verified.weekly_hours_admin: PASS - All 7 days configurable with toggle and time inputs
features_verified.dynamic_open_closed_status: PASS - Shows real-time status based on weekly hours
features_verified.past_slot_filtering: PASS - Today's past times filtered from booking slots
features_verified.multiple_bookings_per_slot: PASS - Multiple customers can book same slot
features_verified.error_handling_fixed: PASS - Booking errors show string messages (tested in console)
features_verified.holidays_tab_removed: PASS - Holidays not in admin sidebar menu
